arts.ttl: Liverpool cult hero announces retirement just six years after leaving Anfield and launches candidacy for president of his country's FA
arts.sum: The Anfield cult hero, who spent three seasons on Merseyside under Jurgen Klopp , told reporters at a press conference in Tallinn, 'my legs couldn't take it anymore'.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool receive transfer boost in pursuit of Barcelona-linked Nico Williams?
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool reportedly receive a boost in their efforts to sign Barcelona-linked Nico Williams from Athletic Bilbao.

arts.ttl: 'A bit of a miracle' - How Girona went from 'amateurs' to Champions League
arts.sum: BBC Sport visits Girona to find out how the Catalan club went from playing in the lower divisions to becoming part of the City Football Group and reaching the Champions League.

arts.ttl: 'I'm going to stop' - Pep Guardiola drops Man City bombshell as Liverpool watch on
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has extended his contract with Manchester City until 2026 but has revealed what his next step will be after that

arts.ttl: Meet the £83m English wonderkid you've never heard of as we reveal why Liverpool, Chelsea and Tottenham are desperate to sign star Man City let slip
arts.sum: AADAM PATEL IN DORTMUND: Going into Wednesday's Champions League clash against Barcelona, the boy from Reading averages a goal or assist every 97 minutes.

arts.ttl: 'I can't see them getting all three done' - Rio Ferdinand predicts huge Liverpool transfer exit
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news as Rio Ferdinand provides his verdict on the contracts of Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: Follow live: Liverpool face Girona at the Estadi Montilivi
arts.sum: Arne Slot's table-topping Liverpool side look to maintain their perfect record in the Champions League as they travel to face Girona on matchday six

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand claims keeping Virgil van Dijk, Mo Salah AND Trent Alexander-Arnold would be 'monumental' for Liverpool - as Steve McManaman names the one star he expects to go
arts.sum: Captain Van Dijk, Alexander-Arnold and Salah are all potential departures from Anfield this summer, with less than six months left on their deals before they can leave as free agents.

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate offers Liverpool injury update hours before Champions League match in Girona
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate suffered a knee injury in Liverpool's 2-0 win over Real Madrid last month

arts.ttl: Girona announce major injury setback ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: La Liga outfit Girona have on Tuesday evening announced an altogether considerable setback on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that attacker Bojan Miovski is set for an incoming…
